**Prove you own the game**
- ***First time only***
- Please DM me a screenshot of your Steam client showing the game, the playtime and the achievements.
- Or, please DM me the purchase confirmation of your Steam/GoG purchase,
- Or, link to your Steam profile and/or Steam comment where your ownerships are publicly visible.

-> email: akarnokd@gmail.com
-> Discord: @akarnokd

Otherwise, your report will be ignored and your account banned from accessing this repository. If you argue or complain about this policy, same ignore and ban applies.

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g. iOS]
 - Browser [e.g. chrome, safari]
 - Version [e.g. 22]

**Smartphone (please complete the following information):**
 - Device: [e.g. iPhone6]
 - OS: [e.g. iOS8.1]
 - Browser [e.g. stock browser, safari]
 - Version [e.g. 22]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
